dashboard.title: Production Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome back. You have {{count}} critical tasks requiring immediate attention.
dashboard.subtitleIdle: Welcome back. Everything is running smoothly.

inbox.notificationsDesc: Updates from Editor, Board, and system
inbox.revisionsDesc: Editor has requested revisions to proposal or manuscript

assistantDirectory.title: Assistant Directory
assistantDirectory.subtitle: Browse and invite assistants to collaborate on your series.

card.activeAssignmentTitle: You already have an ACTIVE collaboration with this assistant

empty.title: No assistants match your filters
empty.description: Try removing the specialization filter or adjusting your level keyword.

error.loadFailed: Could not load the assistant directory. Please try again.

invite.dialogDescription: Send a collaboration invite — the assistant must accept before you can assign tasks. The hire window must be in the future and end after it starts.
invite.seriesHint: BE does not validate series ownership for invites — this is metadata only.
invite.taskTypesHint: Select at least one specialization you intend to assign.
invite.errorGeneric: Could not send the invite. Please try again.
invite.errorDuplicate: You already have an ACTIVE collaboration with this assistant — duplicates are not allowed.
invite.errorInvalidHire: Invalid hire window. Please pick valid start/end dates.
invite.errorHireOrder: Hire end must be after hire start.
invite.errorHirePast: Hire end must be in the future.
invite.errorNoTaskType: Please select at least one task type.

myStudio.title: Studio
myStudio.subtitle: Track all assistants currently or previously hired for your series.

empty.title: No hires yet
empty.description: When an assistant accepts your invite, the relationship will show up here.

error.loadFailed: Could not load your studio. Please try again.

stats.scopeNote: Counts reflect the current page only, not your entire catalogue.

empty.title: No series yet
empty.description: Create your first proposal to submit it to the editorial board.

error.loadFailed: Failed to load your series. Please try again.

seriesDetail.title: Series Detail
seriesDetail.subtitle: View proposal information and sample Name pages

editProposal.title: Edit Proposal
editProposal.subtitle: Update your proposal fields. Leave a field unchanged to keep its current value.
editProposal.notEditableDescription: This proposal can only be edited while the series is DRAFT or while the proposal is awaiting your revisions (PROPOSAL_REVISION).
editProposal.removeExistingCharacterConfirm: Remove this character design? It will be deleted when you save.
editProposal.nameErrorGeneric: Failed to update the sample Name pages. Please try again.
editProposal.nameMissing: The proposal's sample Name could not be found. Reload the series and try again.
editProposal.nameConflict: The sample Name can no longer be edited in its current state.
editProposal.errorGeneric: Failed to update proposal. Please try again.
editProposal.errorConflict: This proposal can no longer be edited (status changed).
editProposal.errorPermission: You can only edit proposals you own.
editProposal.errorNotFound: The series no longer exists. Reload your series list.
editProposal.unsavedChangesDescription: You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you leave this page.

revisions.title: Editor revision requests
revisions.resolveError: Could not update the revision request. Please try again.

drawer.subtitle: All revision request rounds for this series

empty.title: No revision requests yet
empty.description: When an Editor sends a revision request, it will appear here.

drawer.footerHint: Press ESC or click outside to close

proposal.title: Proposal
proposal.empty: This series has no proposal yet.

actions.errorGeneric: The proposal action failed. Reload and try again.

delete.title: Delete this draft?
delete.description: "{{title}}" and its sample Name will be permanently deleted.

withdraw.title: Withdraw this proposal?
withdraw.description: "{{title}}" will leave the editorial workflow and move to Withdrawn.
withdraw.reasonPlaceholder: Tell the Editor why you are withdrawing...

reopen.success: Proposal reopened. Back to draft to edit and resubmit.

errors.NotSeriesOwner: You can only change proposals you own.
errors.ProposalNotEditable: The proposal is no longer editable in its current state.
errors.ProposalNotDeletable: Only a draft proposal can be deleted.
errors.InvalidProposalState: The proposal is not waiting for resubmission.
errors.InvalidNameState: The sample Name is not waiting for resubmission.
errors.InvalidSeriesTransition: The series is not in a state that allows this action.

error.loadFailed: Failed to load series details. Please try again.

notFound.title: Series not found
notFound.description: This series may have been removed or you do not have access.

submit.missingNamePages: Add at least one sample Name page before submitting.
submit.dialogDescription: "{{title}}" will move into the review queue. After submitting you will not be able to edit the proposal until the Editor responds.
submit.bullet1: The proposal moves to In Review.
submit.bullet2: Your sample Name pages are sent to the Editor.
submit.bullet3: You cannot edit the proposal while it is under review.
submit.errorPermission: Only the series owner can submit this proposal.
submit.errorConflict: The series can no longer be submitted in its current state.
submit.errorFranchiseConsent: The original Mangaka must approve this franchise proposal before it can be submitted.
submit.errorGeneric: Failed to submit series. Please try again.

publication.title: Publication
publication.empty: No chapters have been created yet.
publication.emptyHint: Click "Create new chapter" in the top-right to start the first chapter.

error.loadFailed: Failed to load the chapter list.

create.dialogDescription: A new chapter will be created for this series. The latest Editor-approved Name (Storyboard) will be auto-matched to seed the Manuscript and Schedule.
create.errorGeneric: Failed to create the chapter. Please try again.
create.errorInvalidNumber: Chapter number must be an integer ≥ 1.

error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

notFound.title: Chapter not found
notFound.description: This chapter may have been removed or you do not have access.

header.tabPagesDisabledHint: Approve the Name storyboard first to unlock pages.

publication.workbenchSubtitle: Manage the storyboard (Name) and production pages for this chapter.

nameSection.title: Name (Storyboard)
nameSection.empty: No Name yet for this chapter.
nameSection.emptyHint: Click "Create Name" to start your storyboard.
nameSection.noPages: This Name has no pages yet — upload at least one.

create.dialogDescription: Upload one or more storyboard pages. The Name stays as a draft until you submit it for review.
create.allowedHint: PNG, JPG or WEBP. Max 15MB per file.

edit.dialogDescription: Currently {{count}} page(s). Remove pages you no longer need, then add new ones. Saves as a single update.
edit.empty: This Name has no pages left. Add at least one image before saving.
edit.errorEmpty: A Name must have at least one page.

submit.error: Could not submit the Name. Please refresh and try again.

remove.confirm: Delete this Name draft and all of its storyboard pages?

pagesSection.title: Pages (Production)
pagesSection.subtitle: Pencil/ink pages uploaded per chapter.
pagesSection.gatedDesc: Approve the Name first — pages can only be uploaded once the storyboard is APPROVED.
pagesSection.empty: No pages uploaded yet for this chapter.

upload.dialogDescription: Choose a pencil/ink image to upload as a page. The first page pushes the manuscript into IN_PRODUCTION.
upload.errorInvalidNumber: Page number must be a positive integer.

name.subtitle: Storyboard pages for the Editor to review before production.
name.lockedHint: Create the storyboard on the Name tab first to unlock this workflow.

timeline.title: Review lifecycle
timeline.revisionCallout: The Editor has requested changes. Resubmit when you're done editing pages above.

pagesLocked.title: Pages are locked
pagesLocked.description: Once the Editor approves the storyboard, you'll be able to upload pencil/ink pages and review them here.

pages.title: Pages
pages.subtitle: Composite reader — TOC, page panels and editor notes.

pagesReader.title: {{chapterTitle}} — Ch.{{n}}
pagesReader.subtitle: Scroll vertically between pages. The TOC on the left tracks the page in view; editor feedback surfaces on the right.
pagesReader.emptyDesc: Upload your first pencil/ink page below to start production.
pagesReader.replaceCompositeHint: Pick a new composite file. The previous one is replaced.
pagesReader.accessDenied: You do not have access to this chapter's pages, or the collaboration is no longer active.
pagesReader.editPageNumberDescription: Enter a new order number. Page numbers must be unique within the chapter.

delete.title: Delete page {{n}}?
delete.description: This cannot be undone and also removes unapproved regions and tasks attached to the page.
delete.taskCount: {{count}} related task will be checked before deletion.
delete.taskCount_other: {{count}} related tasks will be checked before deletion.
delete.taskCountUnknown: The related task count could not be loaded. The backend will still validate deletion safely.
delete.success: Page deleted with {{regions}} regions and {{tasks}} related tasks.
delete.error: The page cannot be deleted. Completed pages and pages with approved tasks are protected.

composer.title: Upload page {{n}}
composer.dropOrClick: Drop an image here or click to choose

notes.title: Editor notes
notes.forPage: Showing notes for the current page
notes.noSelection: Scroll the centre to pick a page
notes.empty: Select a page to see editor feedback.
notes.noNotes: No notes on this page yet.

delete.confirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. All related regions and tasks will also be deleted.
delete.errorHasApprovedTasks: Cannot delete a page with approved tasks.
delete.errorPageNotEditable: This page is locked and cannot be deleted.
delete.errorChapterOnHold: Chapter is on hold. Resume it first.

deleteBulk.confirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. All related regions and tasks will also be deleted.
deleteBulk.errorPageNotEditable: Some pages are locked and cannot be deleted.
deleteBulk.errorHasApprovedTasks: Some pages have approved tasks — cannot delete.
deleteBulk.errorPageNotFound: Some pages do not exist or do not belong to this chapter.
deleteBulk.errorChapterOnHold: Chapter is on hold. Resume it first.
deleteBulk.errorAccessDenied: You do not have permission to delete these pages.

updatePageNumber.errorDuplicate: This page number is already in use in this chapter.

manuscript.label: Manuscript
manuscript.completePagesHint: Complete every page before submitting the manuscript to the Editor.
manuscript.noPagesHint: Upload at least 1 page before submitting the manuscript.
manuscript.tasksPendingHint: Please complete all tasks (assigned to assistants) before submitting the manuscript.
manuscript.readyForPrintHint: Manuscript is ready. Waiting for the Editor to publish.
manuscript.coOwnerPending: Waiting for the co-owner to approve before publishing.

resubmit.success: Revised manuscript submitted to the Editor.

errors.invalidType: Only PNG, JPG or WEBP images are allowed.

wizard.title: Propose New Series
wizard.subtitle: Fill in the details to create a new series proposal for editorial review.
wizard.step1Desc: Title, cover image, genres, demographic and publication cadence.
wizard.step2Desc: Write the story synopsis for your series (max 5000 characters).
wizard.step3Desc: Upload design images for main characters (sent as object keys).
wizard.step4Desc: Upload sample Name (storyboard) pages for the first chapter.
wizard.createSuccess: Proposal draft created. Review it, then submit it to the Editor when ready.
wizard.uploadCoverSubtitle: Drag & drop or choose one image (PNG, JPG, WEBP)
wizard.genresHint: Pick one or more. Must be from the fixed list.
wizard.demographicHint: Primary audience segment the series targets (by age and gender).
wizard.estimatedLengthHint: Approximate total chapters planned for the entire series (minimum 1).
wizard.synopsisPlaceholder: Start writing your story synopsis here (max 5000 characters)...
wizard.uploadNamePageSubtitle: Drag & drop or choose image files (PNG, JPG, WEBP)
wizard.uploadCharacterSubtitle: Drag & drop or choose image files (PNG, JPG, WEBP)

errors.unauthenticated: You must be signed in to create a proposal.
errors.titleRequired: Enter a series title before continuing.
errors.submitFailed: Failed to create proposal. Please try again.

empty.pickSeries: Pick a series to get started.
empty.pickChapter: Pick a chapter within the series.
empty.pickPage: Pick a page within the chapter to see its tasks.

tasksTab.revisionRequired: Describe what needs to be revised.

revisionDialog.title: Request revision

list.title: Region list

detail.title: Region detail
detail.empty: Select a region to see details.
detail.deleteConfirm: Delete this region? Regions with tasks will fail.

errors.aiTimeout: AI segment timed out, please retry.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Updates on your proposals, series reviews, deadlines, and contract activity.

empty.title: You're all caught up
empty.description: No notifications to show right now.

error.loadFailed: Could not load notifications. Please try again.
error.markReadFailed: Could not mark the notification as read. Please try again.

rankings.title: Rankings
rankings.subtitle: See how your series is performing in the latest and historical readership rankings.

latest.title: Latest reflected period
latest.description: The newest board from the guest voting + postcard results. Use the chips to focus on weekly, monthly, or irregular cadence.
latest.empty: No results yet for this period.

history.title: Historical periods
history.description: Pick a previously reflected period to inspect its board.
history.label: Period
history.prompt: Pick a period above to see its ranking.

trend.title: My series trend
trend.description: Rank over the last 12 reflected periods, colour-coded by risk level. Only series you own are visible (BE-scoped).
trend.label: Series
trend.noSeries: You have no published series yet — nothing to chart.
trend.empty: No reflected periods recorded for this series yet.
trend.noRanks: No rank data available for this series yet.
trend.prompt: Select a series to view its trend.
trend.promptHint: Trend data is BE-scoped — you can only chart series you own.

error.loadFailed: Could not load rankings. Please try again.
